title: dactylorhiza × dubreuilhii
intro: Dactylorhiza × dubreuilhii is a hybrid orchid plant, resulting from the cross between Dactylorhiza sambucina and Coeloglossum viride. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional European herbalism, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza × dubreuilhii include its anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties, making it useful in treating conditions such as urinary tract infections and inflammation. Dactylorhiza × dubreuilhii is often prepared as an herbal tincture or dried plant material for use in teas and infusions.
